name: Bran Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 teaspoons -3 T Bluten (assumed to be a typo, likely "flour")
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven.
2. Mix all ingredients together until well combined.
3. Shape the dough into a loaf and place it in an ungreased baking dish.
4. Bake at 350°F for approximately 45 minutes or until golden brown.
5. Remove from oven and let cool before serving.
